text:
today, we're announcing a new direction for nuxt.

given the rise of ai, we no longer believe there's a purpose for javascript frameworks, as anyone can easily code their own.

👉 instead, we're going to be focusing on releasing 'framework prompts' you can use to create your own
embed_code:
today, we're announcing a new direction for nuxt. given the rise of ai, we no longer believe there's a purpose for javascript frameworks, as anyone can easily code their own. 👉 instead, we're going to be focusing on releasing 'framework prompts' you can use to create your own

— Nuxt (@nuxt_js) Apr 1, 2026
